$comment: Authorization configuration for GPG signing server.
$comment2: key_aliases maps tier names to GPG key identifiers — update per environment.
$comment3: artifact_profiles maps artifact types to GPG signing parameters.

rpm.description: RPM package — binary detached signature embedded by rpmsign

repodata.description: RPM repo metadata — ASCII detached signature (repomd.xml.asc)

deb-release.description: DEB Release file — ASCII detached signature (Release.gpg)

deb-inrelease.description: DEB Release file — clearsigned combined file (InRelease)

default.description: Phase 1 catch-all — applied to all requests when AUTH_ENABLED=false. Rate limit keyed by source IP.

operator.description: Authorized operator performing manual signing via sign-file CLI.
